description: Request body to submit a proposed patch for a delegated finding via the Assisted Lane (POST /v1/lane/{finding_id}/propose, lane_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). Both 'patch' and 'validation_run_id' are required.

patch.description: Unified diff string representing the proposed fix for the delegated finding.

validation_run_id.description: ID of the validation run that verified this patch against the applicable rule.
